argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; let targetKind = 'answer'; let questionId = null; let answerId = null; let targetUrl = target; if (target.startsWith('answer:')) { const match = target.match(/answer:(\d+):(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; answerId = match ? match[2] : null; targetUrl = 'https://www.zhihu.com/question/' + questionId + '/answer/' + answerId; } else if (target.startsWith('article:')) { const match = target.match(/article:(\d+)/); const articleId = match ? match[1] : null; targetUrl = 'https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/' + articleId; targetKind = 'article'; } else if (target.includes('/question/') && target.includes('/answer/')) { const match = target.match(/\/question\/(\d+)\/answer\/(\d+)/); questionId = match ? match[1] : null; answerId = match ? match[2] : null; } else if (target.includes('zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/')) { const match = target.match(/\/p\/(\d+)/); const articleId = match ? match[1] : null; targetKind = 'article'; } return { targetUrl, targetKind, questionId, answerId }; }

async (intermediate) => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const targetKind = intermediate.targetKind; const questionId = intermediate.questionId; const answerId = intermediate.answerId; let scope = document; if (targetKind === 'answer') { const block = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article, .AnswerItem, [data-zop-question-answer]')).find((node) => { const dataAnswerId = node.getAttribute('data-answerid') || node.getAttribute('data-zop-question-answer') || ''; if (dataAnswerId && dataAnswerId.includes(answerId)) return true; return Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/answer/"]')).some((link) => { const href = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; return href.includes('/question/' + questionId + '/answer/' + answerId); }); }); if (!block) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'not_found', message: 'Answer not found', target_type: targetKind, target: '{{ target }}' }; scope = block; } else { scope = document.querySelector('article') || document.querySelector('.Post-Main') || document.querySelector('[itemprop="articleBody"]') || document; } const addCommentBtn = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => (b.textContent || '').includes('添加评论')); if (!addCommentBtn) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_comment_button', message: 'Add comment button not found', target_type: targetKind, target: '{{ target }}' }; addCommentBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); return { clicked: true }; }

async (intermediate) => { const target = '{{ target }}'; const text = '{{ text }}'; const execute = {{ execute }}; const targetKind = intermediate.targetKind; const questionId = intermediate.questionId; const answerId = intermediate.answerId; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); let scope = document; if (targetKind === 'answer') { const block = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article, .AnswerItem, [data-zop-question-answer]')).find((node) => { const dataAnswerId = node.getAttribute('data-answerid') || node.getAttribute('data-zop-question-answer') || ''; if (dataAnswerId && dataAnswerId.includes(answerId)) return true; return Array.from(node.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/answer/"]')).some((link) => { const href = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; return href.includes('/question/' + questionId + '/answer/' + answerId); }); }); if (!block) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'not_found', message: 'Answer not found', target_type: targetKind, target }; scope = block; } else { scope = document.querySelector('article') || document.querySelector('.Post-Main') || document.querySelector('[itemprop="articleBody"]') || document; } const editor = document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); if (!editor) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_composer', message: 'Comment editor not found after clicking add comment', target_type: targetKind, target }; const submitButton = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /发布|评论|发送/.test(b.textContent || '')); if (!submitButton) return { status: 'error', outcome: 'no_submit', message: 'Submit button not found', target_type: targetKind, target }; editor.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100)); document.execCommand('insertText', false, text); editor.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, data: text, inputType: 'insertText' })); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 200)); if (!execute) { return { status: 'success', outcome: 'preview', message: 'Comment prepared (not submitted - execute=false)', target_type: targetKind, target, prepared_text: text }; } submitButton.click(); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1200)); const createdLink = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/comment/"]')).find((node) => { const href = node.getAttribute('href') || ''; return href.includes('/comment/'); }); if (createdLink) { return { status: 'success', outcome: 'created', message: 'Comment created', target_type: targetKind, target, created_url: new URL(createdLink.getAttribute('href') || '', location.origin).href }; } return { status: 'success', outcome: 'created', message: 'Comment created (fallback verification)', target_type: targetKind, target }; }

description: Create a top-level comment on a Zhihu answer or article
name: Comment

variables.name: target
variables.help: Zhihu target URL or typed target (answer:123:456 or article:123)
